hypothesis: Fade the 30-min opening-range extreme on range/reversal days: poke above OR-high then close back inside -> PUT; poke below OR-low then close back inside -> CALL. Contrarian mirror of the ORB continuation.
sourced_rules: OR = high/low of first 30 min of RTH (Crabel ~10min original; SPY/0DTE convention 5-30min, 'most use 15-30'). FADE: bar.high pokes > OR-high but closes back inside (close<=OR-high) -> buy PUT; bar.low pokes < OR-low but closes back inside (close>=OR-low) -> buy CALL. Entry on reclaim-bar close, fill next bar (no look-ahead). Invalidation = the OR edge just crossed (OR-high above for a PUT, OR-low below for a CALL); stop 'just outside the failed breakout' (Crabel early-entry-failure / FBS). Target/exit = v15 default exits (engine TP1/runner/time-stop). One fade per side per day, first qualifying poke, 45-min cooldown, no entries after 15:00 ET.
published_edge_stat: ORB-family success rate 40-60% (LiteFinance); no source publishes a clean SPY-0DTE single-leg per-trade $ expectancy for the fade -- measured here.
verdict: NO CANDIDATE CLEARS THE BAR. The opening_range_fade does not survive the real-fills / OOS / concentration gate across the swept grid. Best cell (strike_offset=0, premium_stop_pct=-0.08) overall per-trade=-0.24 on n=266, OOS per-trade=-12.29, positive_quarters=2/6, top5_day_pct=None, drop-top5-per-trade=-7.27. Per anti-pattern 2.10 this is reported as a non-survivor, not cherry-picked.

DISCLOSURE.per_trade: per-trade expectancy reported, NOT win-rate alone (OP-14)
DISCLOSURE.is_oos: IS=2025, OOS=2026; both reported per cell
DISCLOSURE.anti_cherry_pick: anti-pattern 2.10 -- if the only positive cell is thin-N / high-concentration / OOS-negative, clears_bar=false and the verdict says so
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: SPY-price fade != option edge; this IS the option-edge test (C3)
DISCLOSURE.timezone: OR anchored to each day's FIRST RTH bar (file TZ stamps inconsistent; ~36 early-2025 days shifted +1h). Contiguity-checked to skip gappy days (L57/L61).
